name: Zesty Barbecued Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, cook ribs in boiling water for 45 to 60 minutes, or until tender.
2. Meanwhile, in a medium saucepan, combine all remaining ingredients; simmer uncovered for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Grill or broil ribs as desired, turning and basting frequently with the sauce.
4. Refrigerate leftovers.
MICROWAVE:
1. To pre-cook ribs, place 1 1/2 lbs of ribs in a 12 x 7-inch shallow baking dish. Add 1/4 cup water. Cover with vented plastic wrap.
2. Microwave on full power (high) for 5 minutes. Reduce to 1/2 power (medium); continue cooking for 7 minutes.
3. Turn ribs over, cook covered at 1/2 power (medium) for an additional 7 minutes longer.
4. Repeat with remaining ribs.
5. Proceed as above.
